name: A-Train 9 V5.0 : Japan Train Simulator Ultimate Edition
short_description: Build railroads. Construct your city. Master transport economics. A-Train 9 V5.0 Ultimate Edition is a realistic railroad management and urban development sandbox where every choice – from track layout to industry logistics – affects the prosperity of your metropolis.
detailed_description:
Notice to customers outside of Japan:

Please be aware that there are some content differences between the version of A Train 9 v5 released in your region, and the version released in Japan.


About the Game

A Deep, Interconnected World of Trains and Cities.

A-Train 9 V5.0: Japan Train Simulator Ultimate Edition blends transport simulation, city building, and economic strategy into a single, richly detailed experience. As the president of your own railway company, you’ll lay tracks and roads, build stations, buy trains, manage timetables and steer the growth of tiny villages into bustling cities.

This isn’t just a highly detailed railroad sim – it’s a living, breathing ecosystem where every train timetable, suburban expansion, and industrial hub contributes to the success of your metropolis. 

Build Your Vision - Town by Town

Shape a Thriving Transport Network

Lay tracks and stations across mountains, coasts, and plains. Decide where and how your network grows, and watch the city develop around it.

An Ultra Realistic City Simulator

Manage city districts, build infrastructure, and direct urban expansion with powerful tools and 500+ building types. This is a detailed city building sim at its finest. 

Detailed Simulation
Balance industry, logistics, and passenger demand while guiding your economy to prosperity. Every rail decision ripples through the city. 

Drive the Experience

Jump into a train cab or ride as a passenger to see your network from different perspectives – or pull back to a strategic bird’s-eye view and optimize from above. 

Unleash Your Creativity

Explore Construction Mode for sandbox building without resource limits, perfect for freeform planning and creative city design. 

Deep Replayability

Choose from 60 scenarios or create your own challenges with a level editor and Steam Workshop support. 

Your Very Own Metropolis

As the city begins to grow organically around your network, guide and shape it into your personal utopian metropolis.

  • Affect the growth of each district by deciding which buildings to manually construct. Choose from 500 different types!

  • Use powerful landscaping tools to flatten obstacles, redirect rivers or just make the city nice’n hilly.

  • Optimise the type of trains (97 varieties included!), their top speed and the timetables they run to, for maximum efficiency.

What’s New?

  • New features include “Switchyards”, “Train Turnstiles”, and “Railway Couplings” for added realism!

Buy now and start building your transport legacy today.
